channel.title: Strands Agents Blog - Open Source
channel.description: Posts tagged with "Open Source" from the Strands Agents blog.

item.title: Introducing Strands Labs: Get hands-on today with state-of-the-art, experimental approaches to agentic development
item.description: Strands Labs is a new GitHub organization designed to give developers the ability to get hands-on with experimental, state-of-the-art approaches to agentic AI development.

item.title: Introducing Strands Agents, an Open Source AI Agents SDK
item.description: Strands Agents is an open source SDK that takes a model-driven approach to building and running AI agents in just a few lines of code.
